name: Garbanzo Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the vegetable stock and garbanzo beans in a large pot. Bring to a boil and simmer covered for about an hour, until tender. Reserve 1 cup of liquid when drained.
2. In the same pot, combine the garbanzos, reserved liquid, onion, tomatoes, ginger, coriander, garlic, and cumin. Bring to a boil and simmer covered for 20 minutes.
3. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Garnish with lime juice and chopped parsley.
